tool_args.label: Cafecito Chat – Latinos & Friends
tool_args.raw_text: Cafecito Chat, Wednesday, April 9, 2025 – Latinos & Friends

payload.description: Latinos & Friends ERG hosted an informal Cafecito Chat with Justin Vonashek, President of Metro-North Railroad, providing MTA employees an opportunity to learn about his executive role and obtain professional insights.
Young Professional ERG hosted a transit-themed bingo night for employees across the agency to network and make connections.

tool_args.label: The Subway is Storytelling with Pride
tool_args.raw_text: The Subway is Storytelling with Pride, April 24, 2025 – Pride Express, The Generation Project, and The Transit Museum

payload.event_name: The Subway is Storytelling with Pride
payload.description: Pride Express in partnership with the Generations Project participated in The Transit Museum exhibit sharing stories from MTA's LGBTQIA+ communities.
TransportAsian ERG in partnership with MakeUsVisible hosted a presentation focused on the contributions, history, and experiences of the Asian American Community.

tool_args.label: Memorial Day Commemoration – Veterans ERG
tool_args.raw_text: Memorial Day Commemoration, May 22, 2025 – Veterans ERG

payload.description: Veterans Employee Resource Group commemorated Memorial Day with a Wreath ceremony in the lobby of 2 Broadway.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Tour – Multicultural ERG
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison Tour, June 16, 2025 – Multicultural

payload.description: Multicultural Employee Resource Group along with Executive Sponsor Jamie Torres-Springer and Peter Crawford hosted a tour of Grand Central Madison.
